text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Europe/Paris is UTC + 2, so the time difference is 12 hours.
2. Add the time difference to 5 PM (17:00): 17:00 + 12 = 29:00.
3. Adjust for the 24 - hour clock: 29:00 - 24:00 = 05:00, and the date advances to August 13, 1942.
FINAL_ANSWER: 05:00 on August 13, 1942
